gaps: No test covers prolonged idle scenario where the app's connection state display becomes stale/incorrect for a connected device
No test covers the specific scenario of the app showing incorrect earbud-level connection state (left connected, right disconnected) for a Surround 80 device
No test covers the app failing to display the actually connected device (Surround 80) in the device list until app restart
No test covers connection state accuracy after extended idle periods (sleep/wake cycle of phone)
No test covers the app's device list refresh behavior when the phone has been idle for a prolonged period and a device remains connected

generated_testcases.title: TC-PROLONGED-IDLE-001: Verify Surround 80 connection state accuracy after 30-minute phone idle (sleep/wake cycle)
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Ensure a Surround 80 device is connected (verify both left and right earbuds show as connected on the Home screen)
Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC Level and set to 50
Press the phone's Power button to put the phone to sleep (screen off)
Wait 30 minutes (phone remains idle/sleeping)
Wake the phone (press Power button, unlock)
Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the Home screen device card for Surround 80
Observe the earbud connection indicators (left/right icons)
Tap the device card to navigate into Surround 80 device details screen
Observe the connection state for left and right earbuds
generated_testcases.expected: The app correctly displays Surround 80 as the connected device. Both left and right earbuds show as connected. The device list shows Surround 80 without requiring an app restart. No stale or incorrect connection state is displayed.

generated_testcases.title: TC-PROLONGED-IDLE-002: Verify app device list refresh after prolonged idle with Surround 80 connected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Connect to a Surround 80 device (confirm connection on Home screen)
Navigate to Settings → Device List
Verify Surround 80 is listed as the connected device
Press the Home button to background the app
Wait 45 minutes with the phone idle (do not interact with the app)
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app from the app switcher or home screen
Navigate to Settings → Device List
Observe the list of available and connected devices
Tap the Back button to return to the Home screen
Observe the currently connected device name displayed
generated_testcases.expected: The device list correctly shows Surround 80 as the connected device without requiring an app restart. The Home screen displays Surround 80 as the active device. No stale state or missing device entry is observed.

generated_testcases.title: TC-PROLONGED-IDLE-003: Verify earbud-level connection indicators after phone sleep/wake cycle with Surround 80
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Connect to a Surround 80 device
On the Home screen, verify both left and right earbud icons show as connected (green/active state)
Set Transparency Mode to On and set Surround level to 80
Press the Power button to put the phone to sleep
Wait 15 minutes
Wake the phone and unlock
Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the earbud connection icons on the Home screen for left and right
Tap into the Surround 80 device details screen
Observe the per-earbud connection status
Navigate back to Home screen
Observe the device name and connection state
generated_testcases.expected: Both left and right earbuds show as connected on the Home screen and in the device details screen. The app displays Surround 80 as the connected device. No 'left connected, right disconnected' state is shown. The connection state is accurate and matches the actual Bluetooth connection.

generated_testcases.title: TC-PROLONGED-IDLE-004: Verify Surround 80 settings persistence and connection state after extended idle and app force-kill
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Connect to a Surround 80 device
Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC Level and set to 75
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode → Environment and set Surround level to 60
Navigate back to Home screen
Press the Power button to put the phone to sleep
Wait 20 minutes
Wake the phone, unlock
Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe away from recent apps)
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the Home screen for the connected device
Observe the earbud connection indicators (left/right)
Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC Level and note the value
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode → Environment and note the Surround level
generated_testcases.expected: The app correctly shows Surround 80 as the connected device immediately upon launch. Both left and right earbuds show as connected. ANC Level persists at 75. Surround level persists at 60. No app restart is needed to see the connected device.

generated_testcases.title: TC-PROLONGED-IDLE-005: Verify Surround 80 connection state after multiple sleep/wake cycles over 2 hours
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Connect to a Surround 80 device
Verify both earbuds show as connected on Home screen
Put phone to sleep (screen off)
After 10 minutes, wake phone and unlock
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and verify connection state (both earbuds connected, Surround 80 displayed)
Put phone to sleep again
After 20 minutes, wake phone and unlock
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and verify connection state
Put phone to sleep again
After 30 minutes, wake phone and unlock
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and verify connection state
Put phone to sleep again
After 60 minutes, wake phone and unlock
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and verify connection state
Navigate to Settings → Device List and confirm Surround 80 is listed as connected
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode → Speech and set Free level to 40
Navigate back to Home screen and verify device name and earbud state
generated_testcases.expected: After each sleep/wake cycle, the app correctly displays Surround 80 as the connected device. Both left and right earbuds consistently show as connected. The device list always shows Surround 80 without requiring an app restart. Free level setting of 40 persists correctly.

generated_testcases.title: TC-PROLONGED-IDLE-006: Verify app correctly shows Surround 80 (not stale device) after idle with Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Connect to a Surround 80 device
Verify Surround 80 is shown on Home screen with both earbuds connected
Put the phone to sleep (screen off)
Wait 10 minutes
While phone is asleep, place the Surround 80 earbuds into the charging case and close the lid (device disconnects)
Wait 5 minutes
Remove Surround 80 earbuds from the charging case (device reconnects)
Wake the phone and unlock
Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the Home screen device card and earbud connection indicators
Navigate to Settings → Device List
Observe the list of devices
generated_testcases.expected: After the disconnect/reconnect cycle during idle, the app correctly shows Surround 80 as the connected device with both earbuds connected. The device list accurately reflects the reconnected state. No stale 'disconnected' state or incorrect earbud connection indicators are shown.

generated_testcases.title: TC-PROLONGED-IDLE-007: Verify app connection state after phone idle during active media playback on Surround 80
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Connect to a Surround 80 device
Verify both earbuds show as connected
Start playing music or a podcast on the phone (audio routed to Surround 80)
Press the Power button to put the phone to sleep (screen off, audio continues playing)
Wait 25 minutes (audio continues playing through Surround 80 during idle)
Wake the phone and unlock
Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the Home screen device card and earbud connection indicators
Pause the media playback
Observe the connection state again
Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC Level and verify the current value
generated_testcases.expected: The app correctly displays Surround 80 as the connected device with both earbuds connected, even after prolonged idle with active media playback. ANC Level setting is preserved. No stale or incorrect connection state is displayed despite the phone having been asleep.

generated_testcases.title: TC-PROLONGED-IDLE-008: Verify Surround 80 connection state accuracy after phone idle with Transparency Mode active
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Connect to a Surround 80 device
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode → Environment
Set Surround level to 85
Set Free level to 30
Enable Transparency Mode (set to On)
Navigate back to Home screen
Verify both earbuds show as connected
Press the Power button to put the phone to sleep
Wait 35 minutes
Wake the phone and unlock
Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the Home screen device card and earbud connection indicators
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode → Environment
Observe the Surround level and Free level values
Switch to Transparency Mode → Speech tab
Observe the Surround level and Free level values
generated_testcases.expected: The app correctly shows Surround 80 as the connected device with both earbuds connected. Transparency Mode Environment settings persist: Surround level at 85, Free level at 30. Switching to Speech tab shows the last set values for that sub-setting (not reset). No stale connection state or incorrect earbud indicators are displayed.
